query:
SELECT
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_proc WHERE proname = 'aurora_version') AS "aurora!",
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'rds_superuser') AS "rds!",
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'cloudsqlsuperuser') AS "cloudsql!",
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname IN ('azure_pg_admin', 'azuresu')) AS "azure!"
